channel.title: Posts on Darklane Theme Demo
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Darklane Theme Demo

item.title: Shortcode Gallery
item.description: Darklane includes several custom shortcodes to enhance your content beyond standard Markdown.

item.title: Markdown Guide
item.description: This post demonstrates the standard Markdown formatting features supported by Darklane.

item.title: Welcome to Darklane
item.description: Welcome to the Darklane theme demo! This is a simple example post to showcase the basic layout and styling.
